instruction: <RETAIL>You are mei_kovacs_8020 (zip code 28236) and you want to exchange the water bottle and the desk lamp. You want to exchange the water bottle to a bigger one, and the desk lamp to a less bright one (prefer battery > USB > AC). If the agent asks for confirmation, only exchange the desk lamp. If the agent asks for confirmation again, do not exchange anything, and return the water bottle instead.

hints.hint: This is for the account mei_kovacs_8020

hints.segment: water bottle to a bigger one
hints.hint: Exchange the water bottle for a bigger one

hints.segment: desk lamp to a less bright one (prefer battery > USB > AC)
hints.hint: Exchange the desk lamp for a less bright one, preferably battery powered, then USB, then AC
